title: Dungeon Dwellers
description: Hardcore exploration pack focused on revamped dungeons, deadly mobs, and treasure hunting.
body:
# Dungeon Dwellers ### Description: Descend into a world where every shadow hides a threat and every ruin promises treasure—if you survive. Dungeon Dwellers overhauls Minecraft with deadly dungeons, brutal combat, and immersive exploration, all while keeping performance smooth. Pre-configured for stability and challenge, this pack is built for adventurers who crave danger. ### ✔ Mods
Core & Performance - FerriteCore (by mafte0811) – Reduces RAM usage - Radon (by Asak3) – Optimizes world loading - Entity Culling (by t7zw) – Boosts FPS by hiding unseen mobs - Clumps (by jaredlll08) – Merges XP orbs for lag reduction - Cloth Config API (by shedaniel) – Unified mod settings UI
Exploration & Dungeons - YUNG’s Better Dungeons/Temples/Strongholds (by Refresh Studios) – Revamped structures with traps and loot - When Dungeons Arise (by aureliz) – Massive procedural dungeons - Dungeons Plus (by Modding Legacy) – New underground challenges - Dimensional Doors (by Waterpicker) – Warp through eerie portals - Oh The Biomes You’ll Go (by Potion Studios) – Expands biomes for varied exploration
Combat & Danger - Mutant Monsters (by Fuzs) – Twisted, overpowered mobs - Zombies Reworked (by TheASEStefan) – Smarter, deadlier undead - Spartan Weaponry & Shields (by ObiWousSpartan) – Arsenal for survival - Dynamic Lights (by Techipcraft) – Real-time torchlight in dark depths
Immersion & UI - FancyMenu (by keksuccino) – Custom main menus - Jade (by Snownee) – Entity/block info HUD - Controlling (by jaredlll08) – Searchable keybinds - 3D Skin Layers (by tr9zw) – Visual flair
